name: BlazeStake
bestFit: Good target with clean performance; if stake is >50k, 0/0 is better

name: DynoSol
bestFit: Human/curated review; rules are less strictly formalized

name: DoubleZero
bestFit: Strong target only if there is DZ connectivity + 10k external stake

resourceLinks.label: DoubleZero DZDP calculator
resourceLinks.note: Calculator/planning resource; not a generic validator ranking page.

name: JagPool
bestFit: LATAM/APAC/South Africa; SFDP or 40k external stake

name: Edgevana
bestFit: Only Edgevana infrastructure + top 50 ranking; age tier is important

resourceLinks.note: Dynamic validator page/list; verify live content directly.

name: SolStrategies
bestFit: Main path is high 30-day StakeWiz score

name: Vault
bestFit: Baseline <5% commission; elite performance path is effectively 0/0
